thoughts_feature_flags_1353849452158.content: The guard checks `config.decompose?.enabled === false` (strict equality with boolean `false`). Undefined/null does NOT trigger fallback — the config must explicitly set `enabled: false`.

conventions_config_1353850786306.content: When adding a new top-level config section, include it in `kody.config.json` itself so the engine's own config is self-consistent and `config.decompose?.enabled` resolves at runtime.

facts_engine_integration_1353852094385.content: The engine version (`@kody-ade/engine@0.4.4`) ships the guard already — the task only needed to populate the config key to make it operational, not implement the guard.

facts_feature_flags_1353853448621.content: The feature flag is boolean — `enabled: false` means fallback, `enabled: true` (or absent with `=== false` check) means normal decompose behavior.
